  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

BVA_SU4_X73ph2_J81ph2_V2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E1
Recv ID: 7E9
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6E
Func Name: BVA

  },

  },

  {
    "minbytes": 1,

    "sentbytes": "3BB0000000",
    "name": "Write date of after-sales intervention (APV)",

      "Mois APV": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3B8100000000000000000000000000000000000000",
    "name": "Write VIN",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Write VIN": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "23000000000000",
    "name": "ReadMemoryByAddress",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds",
      "plant",
      "aftersales"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Memory Address": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Memory Size": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Record Values read": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "21E0",
    "name": "Dynamic frame",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "11FF",
    "name": "Ecureset (clear self-learning data)",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Reset of all teach-ins (clear self-learning data)": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "ECU Reset status": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "1086",
    "name": "Diag Session",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "DiagnosticMode": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "700000",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "30010001",
    "name": "Output Control",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Output Control Command": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Output Temporary Control List": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Contrôle pilotage": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Output Control Status": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "replybytes": "570000000000",
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Historical Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Standard Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Specific Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Type Of Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 22,
    "sentbytes": "2184",
    "name": "Traceability frame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Réference B (hard+soft)": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "anneé de reprog chez AW plant": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "mois de reprog chez AW plant": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "jour de reprog chez AW plant": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Numéro fournisseur (ASCII format)": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "padding avec $20": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 6,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "310200",
    "name": "SRBLID ( all solenoid check)",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "All solenoids check routine": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Routine input parameter": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine input status": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Shift solenoid S2 error state": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Shift solenoid S1 error state": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Solenoid SLC3 error state": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Solenoid SLC2 error state": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Solenoid SLC1 error state": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Shift-lock error state": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Solenoid SLB1 error state": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Solenoid SLT error state": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Solenoid SLU error state": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Reverse lamp error state": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "310100",
    "name": "SRBLID (N position learning)",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "N position learning": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Routine input parameter": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine input status": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  }
]
